fields.label: Sales Order
fields.description: ERPNext-side anchor. The Map autoname keys on this — exactly one Map per SO. orderNumber on the EE createOrder payload is also this value.

fields.label: EasyEcom Account
fields.description: Which EE Account this push went to. Captured at push time; immutable thereafter (re-routes require manual cancel + re-push).

fields.label: Company
fields.description: Fetched from sales_order for company_scope_doc permission filtering (§31.8.3 pattern).

fields.label: Module
fields.description: EE B2B module captured from EasyEcom Account.ecs_b2b_module at push time. Immutable after push — re-routing modules requires manual cancel + re-push.

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Pushed
Queued
Invoice Pending
Invoice Generated
Cancelled
Drift
fields.description: Status lifecycle: Pushed (Old B2B sync OK) | Queued (New B2B queued OK) | Invoice Pending (Phase 1 marker — polling detected EE invoice; Phase 2 SI mirror NYI) | Invoice Generated (Phase 2 — defined for forward compat) | Cancelled.

fields.label: EE Order ID
fields.description: EE-returned OrderID. Populated synchronously on Old B2B; populated via Stage 3 polling on New B2B.

fields.label: EE Suborder ID
fields.description: EE-returned SuborderID. Same population semantics as ee_order_id.

fields.label: EE Invoice ID
fields.description: EE's invoice identifier returned at order creation (Old B2B). This is EE's internal ID, NOT the ERPNext Sales Invoice docname — that mirror lands in Phase 2.

fields.label: EE Queue ID
fields.description: §11.3.5 — EE's async queue identifier returned by New B2B push (data.queueId from /webhook/v2/createOrder when queue=1). Used by the fast-confirm loop to poll /getQueueStatus and backfill OrderID/SuborderID/InvoiceID within seconds rather than waiting for the */5 polling cron. Null on Old B2B Maps (Old B2B is synchronous — IDs captured at push time, no queue indirection).

fields.label: EE Invoice Number
fields.description: §11.5.2 Mode 2 — EE-side GST invoice number (e.g. 'BMH1-2526-8') populated when EE generates the invoice via its own GSP / marketplace. Distinct from ee_invoice_id (which is EE's internal row identifier, always populated). Empty for pre-invoice orders; populated by Mode 2 polling when EE invoices.

fields.label: Mirrored Sales Invoice
fields.description: §11.5.2 Mode 2 — link to the ERPNext Sales Invoice mirrored from EE when EE generated the invoice on its own side. Null in Mode 1 (Custom GSP — we mint the SI from the request, link via Custom Field on SI itself) and for pre-invoice orders.

fields.label: SI Mirrored At
fields.description: §11.5.2 — when the Mode 2 SI mirror was created. Used to detect orders where mirror was attempted but produced an incomplete SI (e.g. Discrepancy raised mid-mirror).

fields.label: Pushed At
fields.description: When createOrder returned 200 — fixed at insert, never overwritten.

fields.label: Cancelled At
fields.description: When EE acknowledged the cancellation (ERPNext-initiated in Phase 1; EE-initiated via Stage 3 polling fallback or Phase 2 webhook).

fields.label: Last Polled At
fields.description: Most recent Get All Orders sweep that touched this row. Stage 3 wires.

fields.label: Payload Hash
fields.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical-JSON request payload. Used for re-push idempotency detection (identical payload skips the EE call).

fields.label: Request Payload
fields.description: Full JSON sent to /webhook/v2/createOrder. Stored readable (not gzipped) for audit / replay diagnostics.

fields.label: Response Payload
fields.description: Full JSON returned from EE — captures the response shape that drove the status transition.

fields.label: Last Error
fields.description: Last failure message from a push or cancel attempt. Empty when the most recent attempt succeeded.
